## What changed

Briefly describe the change and why it improves Dittobot.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept `SKILL.md` lean and changed it only for broadly useful behavior.
- [ ] I added or updated regression coverage for any new failure mode.
- [ ] I ran `python3 scripts/validate_skill.py`.
- [ ] I ran `python3 scripts/regression_100.py`.
- [ ] I ran `python3 -m py_compile scripts/*.py` if scripts changed.
- [ ] I did not commit private drafts, API keys, live-eval transcripts, or customer data.

## Notes

Mention any tradeoffs, untested paths, or follow-up cases.
